usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 7 booking artifacts were ingested successfully with correct type classification, provider names, and confirmation codes. ExtractBookingField returned accurate, specific answers for all 7 targeted questions, correctly referencing exact terminal numbers, times, cancellation deadlines, insurance types, fuel policies, meal schedules, and tasting counts directly from the raw text. The Hanoi hostel disambiguation was perfect -- the AI isolated Hanoi-specific check-in times without confusing them with the Hue or Saigon properties. The negative test (asking about hotel wifi on a flight booking) was handled correctly with no hallucination. This is an excellent booking management system.

Q9_flight_terminal_and_time.question: What terminal and what time does my outbound flight depart?
Q9_flight_terminal_and_time.answer: Your outbound flight departs from New York (JFK) Terminal 4 at 6:45 PM EDT.

Q10_hotel_cancellation.question: What is the cancellation policy?
Q10_hotel_cancellation.answer: You can cancel for free until June 12, 2026 (11:59 PM CEST). If you cancel after this date, the first night's charge (EUR 289.00) will be applied. In case of a no-show, the full stay will be charged.

Q11_activity_meeting_and_items.question: What is the meeting point and what should I bring?
Q11_activity_meeting_and_items.answer: Your meeting point is at the Nativity Facade entrance (Carrer de la Marina side), at C/ de la Marina, 253, 08013 Barcelona. Look for the guide holding an orange "Barcelona Expert Tours" sign. You should bring a valid photo ID (passport or national ID), comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen and a water bottle, and this confirmation (printed or on your phone). Shoulders and knees must be covered.

Q12_car_insurance_and_fuel.question: What insurance is included and what's the fuel policy?
Q12_car_insurance_and_fuel.answer: The included insurance consists of Super CDW (zero excess) and Theft Protection. The fuel policy is Full-to-Full.

Q13_hostel_hanoi_checkin.question: What time is check-in at the Hanoi hostel?
Q13_hostel_hanoi_checkin.answer: Check-in at Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel is from 2:00 PM to 10:00 PM.
Q13_hostel_hanoi_checkin.note: Correctly disambiguated Hanoi from Hue and Saigon properties

Q14_ryokan_meals_and_dinner.question: What meals are included and what time is dinner?
Q14_ryokan_meals_and_dinner.answer: The included meals are Kaiseki Dinner and Traditional Japanese Breakfast. The Kaiseki Dinner is served in-room at either 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM.

Q15_tour_tastings_and_dietary.question: How many food tastings are included and what dietary accommodations are available?
Q15_tour_tastings_and_dietary.answer: There are 12 tastings included across 3 markets and 4 street food stands. Dietary accommodations include vegetarian, gluten-free, and vegan substitutions for most stops, provided you notify them at least 48 hours before the tour.

Q16_negative_test.question: What is the hotel's wifi password?
Q16_negative_test.answer: I'm sorry, but the provided booking confirmation is for a flight with Delta Air Lines and does not contain any information about hotels or their WiFi passwords.
Q16_negative_test.expected_behavior: Should indicate info not present, no hallucination
